headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences loses key contract in Scandinavia to competitor

sentiment.reasoning: The loss of a key contract directly impacts revenue and market share in the Scandinavian region.

headlines.headline: Calvis Sciences announces $0.8B share buyback program

headlines.headline: Ulvyn Microchips secures $650M contract with a national infrastructure agency

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
